headline: DAL Stock In Spotlight Ahead Of Q2 Earnings – Analysts See A ‘Constructive Setup’ For Airlines
summary: According to Koyfin data, the consensus revenue estimate for Delta Air Lines stands at $18.85 billion, and adjusted earnings per share are expected to be $1.50.
